NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion For Order To Impose Personal Liability On Third Party, Norcal Construction & Landscaping Design For Judgment; Request For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Jun-18-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Judgment Creditor's Motion For Order To Impose Personal Liability On Third Party, Norcal Construction & Landscaping Design For Judgment; Request For Attorney's Fees is granted in the amount of $7,843.39. No opposition has been filed. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
